S.FORM: O 2024 miheca mamalacongtong no Cung-huwa-min-ku cecay mamalacongtong no Cung-huwa-min-ku. Mipalowad to 2024 miheca saka 1 folad saka 13 romi'ad. == Mamararid to ko ==
S.PHON: o~u **** miħəʦa mamaɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u ʦo~u~uŋ-ħo~u~uwa-min-ko~u~u ʦəʦaj mamaɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u ʦo~u~uŋ-ħo~u~uwa-min-ko~u~u. mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. == mamarariɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ==
S.FORM: O 2024 miheca mamalacongtong no Cung-huwa-min-ku cecay mamalacongtong no Cung-huwa-min-ku. Mipalowad to 2024 miheca saka 1 folad saka 13 romi'ad. == Mamararid to ko ==
S.PHON: o~u **** miħəʦa mamaɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u ʦo~u~uŋ-ħo~u~uwa-min-ko~u~u ʦəʦaj mamaɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u ʦo~u~uŋ-ħo~u~uwa-min-ko~u~u. mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. == mamarariɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ==
